# Gastify — Project Summary

*Generated by project-documenter · 2026-06-09*

---

## 1. Executive Summary

**Gastify** is a Chilean smart expense tracker that turns paper receipts and PDF
bank statements into a categorized, multi-currency spending ledger with AI-driven
analytics. It is a full-stack rebuild of the BoletApp prototype, moving from
Firebase/Cloud Functions/Firestore to a production-grade backend (FastAPI +
PostgreSQL + Alembic) serving a React web portal and a React Native Android app.

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Domain** | Personal finance / expense tracking — Chile-first, LATAM + EU + US + Canada |
| **Maturity** | MVP (active rebuild, P1–P15 roadmap phases implemented) |
| **Primary audience** | Individuals and household groups tracking multi-currency expenses |
| **Core differentiator** | AI receipt scanning with a fail-closed math-reconciliation gate — scans that don't reconcile route to `NEEDS_REVIEW`, never silent completion |

The system has been deployed and production-proven across three completed roadmap
milestone groups: receipt scanning (G4), statement reconciliation (P5), and
reports v2 (P13–P15 — Reports detail, persona insights, quarter/year breakdowns).

---

## 2. Architecture Overview

![High-Level Architecture](diagrams/high-level-architecture.drawio.png)

Gastify follows a **thin-client / thick-backend** pattern: three surfaces share one
contract (a FastAPI-generated OpenAPI spec), and all business logic — including
data ownership, AI extraction, FX conversion, and analytics aggregation — lives
exclusively in the backend.

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      External Services                    │
│   Firebase Auth   │   Google Gemini 2.5 Flash   │  FX API  │
└────────┬──────────┴────────────┬────────────────┴────┬────┘
         │ verify token          │ structured extract  │ rates
         ▼                       ▼                     ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    FastAPI Backend (G1–G5)                 │
│  Auth middleware → RLS GUC → Route handler → Domain wells │
│  PostgreSQL 16 (RLS deny-by-default, least-privilege role)│
└──────┬────────────────────────────────────────┬──────────┘
       │ HTTP / SSE                             │ WebSocket
       ▼                                        ▼
┌─────────────────┐                  ┌──────────────────────┐
│  React Web SPA  │                  │  React Native Mobile  │
│  (G6 — web/)    │                  │  (G7 — mobile/)      │
└─────────────────┘                  └──────────────────────┘
```

**Key architecture invariants:**

1. **RLS always enforced** — `app.ownership_scope_id` GUC set before every query;
   the `gastify_app` runtime role is `NOBYPASSRLS`; a boot guard refuses start otherwise.
2. **Scope-swap is validate-then-swap** — group access calls `app_is_scope_member`
   (`SECURITY DEFINER` oracle) and only swaps GUC on confirmed membership.
3. **Money is minor-unit integers** — all amounts are `BigInteger`; no floats touch
   financial data.
4. **AI math gate is fail-closed** — extraction that fails reconciliation (delta > 1
   minor unit) routes to `NEEDS_REVIEW`, never silent completion.
5. **Content-lock on share** — once a transaction is shared to a group, its
   merchant/amount/date/items are immutable on the personal source.
6. **Bearer-only auth, no CSRF surface** — `Authorization: ******;
   no cookies, no ambient credentials.
7. **Gemini provider parity enforced by environment** — `staging-e2e` always runs
   deterministic fixtures; `staging` + `production` run real Gemini; `local` runs mock.

---

## 3. Processing Pipeline

![Processing Pipeline](diagrams/processing-pipeline.drawio.png)

### Receipt Scan Pipeline (G4)

```
Client uploads image (multipart)
  │
  ▼
POST /api/v1/scans
  │
  ├─► Credit atomicity: debit user credit + insert pending_scan in one transaction
  │
  ├─► Image validation + resize (Pillow — Gemini input optimization)
  │
  ├─► Gemini Vision extraction (PydanticAI output_type)
  │      └─ provider: mock | fixture | gemini  (D76)
  │
  ├─► Deterministic coalescing (coalesce.py)
  │      └─ merge partial items, normalize amounts
  │
  ├─► V4 Categorization agent (PydanticAI)
  │      └─ 86-category taxonomy (ItemCategory L1–L4)
  │
  ├─► Math reconciliation gate (math_gate.py)
  │      ├─ pass  → persist_scan.py → Transaction + TransactionItems
  │      └─ fail  → status = NEEDS_REVIEW + typed review signals
  │
  └─► SSE stream (web) / WebSocket stream (mobile)
         └─ progress events: submitted → processing → extracting →
            categorizing → verified → completed | failed
```

### Statement Reconciliation Pipeline (P5)

```
Client uploads PDF (multipart) + optional card alias + consent
  │
  ▼
POST /api/v1/statements
  │
  ├─► PDF parsing (PyMuPDF / codex-pdf-text provider)
  │
  ├─► Gemini structured extraction (statement_extraction.py)
  │
  ├─► Statement-to-receipt matching (statement_reconciliation.py)
  │      ├─ date tolerance: ±3 days (configurable)
  │      ├─ amount tolerance: 1% (configurable)
  │      └─ merchant fuzzy match (threshold 0.72 — configurable)
  │
  ├─► Coverage metric: matched / statement-only / app-only / ambiguous
  │
  └─► WebSocket progress stream → reconciliation bucket display
```

---

## 4. Core Components

![Component Relationships](diagrams/component-relationships.drawio.png)

### Backend (FastAPI — `backend/app/`)

| Component | Path | Responsibility |
|-----------|------|----------------|
| **API Core (G1)** | `api/`, `main.py`, `middleware.py` | 11 routers, RequestId + AccessLog middleware, CORS, lifespan boot guard |
| **Config** | `config.py` | All `GASTIFY_*` env vars (pydantic-settings); startup validation enforces environment policy |
| **Data Model (G2)** | `models/`, `schemas/`, `alembic/` | SQLAlchemy ORM (34 migrations); Pydantic request/response schemas; V4 taxonomy |
| **Auth + Ownership (G3)** | `auth/`, `api/consent.py` | Firebase ID-token verification; JIT user provisioning; RLS GUC injection; 4-jurisdiction consent |
| **Scan Pipeline (G4)** | `agents/`, `services/scan_worker.py`, `services/coalesce.py`, `services/math_gate.py`, `prompts/` | Gemini vision → coalesce → categorize → math gate → persist; SSE/WS streaming |
| **Statement Pipeline (P5)** | `services/statement_worker.py`, `services/statement_reconciliation.py`, `services/statement_extraction.py` | PDF upload → Gemini extraction → fuzzy reconciliation → bucket output |
| **Integrations (G5)** | `services/fx.py`, `services/provider_retry.py`, `services/scan_providers.py` | Firebase admin, Gemini retry/error classification, FX rate cache, PDF parser |
| **Insights (P6)** | `services/insights/` | Server-side analytics: monthly/quarterly/yearly rollups, store+item tree, gravity centers, trend series |
| **Groups (P10)** | `api/groups.py`, `alembic/versions/028–033` | Multi-tenant group sharing: RLS scope-swap oracle, consent-gated detail, content-lock |
| **Notifications (P7)** | `api/notifications.py`, `api/push_tokens.py` | FCM push-token registration, in-app notification store |

### Web Portal (`web/src/`)

| Component | Path | Responsibility |
|-----------|------|----------------|
| **Router** | `routes/` | TanStack Router file-based routes (scan, transactions, reports, statements, groups, settings) |
| **API client** | `lib/` | `openapi-fetch` typed client generated from backend spec; Firebase Auth token injection |
| **State stores** | `stores/uiStore.ts` | Zustand — `activeScope` toggles personal/group context; triggers RLS GUC swap |
| **Scan flow** | `routes/scan.tsx` | SSE progress stream with auto-reconnect + exponential backoff |
| **Reports** | `routes/reports.tsx` | Period cards → `ReportDetailOverlay` → grouped breakdown + persona insight + drill |
| **Statements** | `routes/statements.tsx` | PDF upload + WebSocket progress + reconciliation bucket view |

### Mobile App (`mobile/src/`)

| Component | Path | Responsibility |
|-----------|------|----------------|
| **Navigation** | `navigation/` | React Navigation native stack |
| **Scan screen** | `screens/ScanScreen.tsx` | Camera/gallery capture → multipart upload → WebSocket progress |
| **Statements screen** | `screens/StatementsScreen.tsx` | DocumentPicker → PDF upload → statement journey |
| **Auth storage** | `lib/` | `expo-secure-store` for API bearer-token snapshot (keystore/keychain) |
| **API client** | `lib/` | Same `openapi-fetch` + generated types as web |

---

## 5. API Contracts / Message Schemas

All routes are under `/api/v1/`. The OpenAPI spec is generated at
`web/src/lib/openapi-spec.json` (regenerate: `npm run generate:api` in `web/`).

### Key endpoint groups

| Group | Prefix | Description |
|-------|--------|-------------|
| Health | `GET /api/v1/health` | Liveness + Alembic head check |
| Scans | `POST /api/v1/scans` | Receipt upload; `GET /api/v1/scans/{id}` for status |
| Scan stream | `GET /api/v1/scans/{id}/stream` (SSE) | Web progress stream |
| Scan WebSocket | `WS /ws/scans/{id}?token=` | Mobile progress stream |
| Transactions | `GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/transactions` | Ledger CRUD; `validateSearch` date-range filter |
| Items | `GET/PATCH /api/v1/items` | Line-item editing + flag management |
| Statements | `POST /api/v1/statements` | Statement upload + consent |
| Statement stream | `GET /api/v1/statements/{id}/stream` (SSE) | Web statement progress |
| Statement WebSocket | `WS /ws/statements/{id}?token=` | Mobile statement progress |
| Insights | `GET /api/v1/insights/monthly` | Monthly/quarterly/yearly aggregates |
| Insights tree | `GET /api/v1/insights/tree` | 4-level store+item hierarchy |
| Groups | `POST/GET /api/v1/groups` | Group create/list; invite lifecycle |
| Consent | `POST /api/v1/consent` | Jurisdiction-aware consent records |
| Reference | `GET /api/v1/reference/categories` | V4 taxonomy (86 categories, L1–L4) |
| Push tokens | `POST /api/v1/push-tokens` | FCM device registration |
| Notifications | `GET /api/v1/notifications` | In-app notification feed |
| Metrics | `GET /api/v1/metrics` | Prometheus-compatible counters |

### Scan progress event schema (SSE / WebSocket)

```json
{
  "event": "scan_progress",
  "data": {
    "scan_id": "uuid",
    "status": "processing | extracting | categorizing | verified | completed | failed",
    "progress_pct": 65,
    "review_signals": ["math_mismatch", "low_confidence"],
    "result": { ... }
  }
}
```

### Money representation

All monetary amounts are **minor-unit `BigInteger`** (e.g., 1234 = $12.34 USD or
$1,234 CLP). `ZERO_EXPONENT_CURRENCIES` (CLP, JPY, KRW, …) have no decimal
shift. No floats touch financial data anywhere in the stack.

---

## 6. Infrastructure & Deployment

![Deployment](diagrams/high-level-architecture.drawio.png)

### Environments

| Environment | DB | Gemini provider | Purpose |
|-------------|-----|----------------|---------|
| `local` | SQLite (aiosqlite) | `mock` | Developer loop — no credentials, no Postgres |
| `staging-e2e` | PostgreSQL 16 (Railway) | `fixture` (forced) | Deterministic E2E — Playwright + Maestro screenshot proofs |
| `staging` | PostgreSQL 16 (Railway) | `gemini` (real) | Pre-promotion validation |
| `production` | PostgreSQL 16 (Railway) | `gemini` (real) | Live |

### Deployment flow

```
feature branch
  │
  └─► git push origin HEAD:staging
        │
        ├─► Railway auto-deploys staging-e2e (deterministic fixtures)
        ├─► CI: SCA (pip-audit), mypy, pytest, web build, vitest
        ├─► B2 staging proof: web Playwright + S23 Maestro against deployed staging-e2e
        └─► fast-forward promote: staging → main (production)
```

### Services (Railway)

| Service | Type | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| `gastify-api` | Python web service | `uv run uvicorn app.main:app` |
| `gastify-postgres` | Managed PostgreSQL 16 | `gastify_app` (runtime, NOBYPASSRLS) + `gastify_migrator` (DDL) roles |
| `gastify-web` | Static site | Vite build → Caddy server (`Caddyfile`) |
| `gastify-mobile` | EAS / Expo Go | Android S23 physical device; iOS deferred (D47) |

### Docker (local only)

`docker-compose.yml` at repo root provides a local Postgres instance for
integration testing when SQLite parity is needed.

---

## 7. Extension Patterns

### Adding a new API endpoint

1. Add route handler in `backend/app/api/<domain>.py`.
2. Add Pydantic schemas to `backend/app/schemas/`.
3. Register router in `backend/app/main.py`.
4. Regenerate client types: `cd web && npm run generate:api`.
5. Add pytest tests in `backend/tests/test_<domain>.py`.

### Adding a new AI prompt

1. Create versioned prompt in `backend/app/prompts/<domain>/`.
2. Register in `backend/app/prompts/__init__.py` with `kind` + `id`.
3. Add to `ALLOWED_PROMPT_IDS` for the target environments.
4. Test with the prompt lab CLI: `python -m app.prompt_lab <domain>`.

### Adding a database migration

```bash
cd backend
uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m "describe the change"
uv run alembic upgrade head
```

Migrations live in `backend/alembic/versions/`. Never edit an already-applied
migration — always create a new one.

### Adding a new Postgres RLS policy

Every new tenant table must:
1. Inherit from `OwnershipScope` via a `scope_id FK` column.
2. Enable RLS: `ALTER TABLE … ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;`
3. Define a policy keyed on `app.ownership_scope_id` GUC.
4. Verify the `gastify_app` role can't bypass: `assert_least_privilege_role()` boot
   guard will catch it at startup.

---

## 8. Rules & Anti-Patterns

These rules are derived from observed failures in the BoletApp prototype
(documented in `docs/rebuild/LESSONS.md`):

| Rule | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **R1 — One concept, one store** | Derive UI visibility from scan phase via selector — never store it separately. Dual state machines diverged and caused the BoletApp credit-refund bug. |
| **R2 — Feature isolation via events** | Scan emits `scanResultReady`; editor subscribes. Scan never imports editor action creators. Direct cross-feature imports caused stale renders. |
| **R3 — 500-LOC soft limit** | Split files at 500 LOC (architectural signal) rather than waiting for the 800-LOC hard wall. |
| **R4 — No floats on money** | All amounts are minor-unit `BigInteger`. FX amounts use the same convention. |
| **R5 — Fail-closed math gate** | Scans that don't reconcile (delta > 1 minor unit) go to `NEEDS_REVIEW`. Silent completion is a data-safety regression. |
| **R6 — Validate-then-swap for groups** | `app_is_scope_member` oracle returns `true` before GUC is swapped. A non-member never causes the GUC to point at the group. |
| **R7 — RLS on every tenant table** | Every table that has a `scope_id` FK must have RLS enabled and a policy. Missing policies have caused ownership leaks in the prototype. |
| **R8 — Structured LLM output only** | All Gemini responses consumed as PydanticAI `output_type`. No regex-parsed LLM strings in production. |
| **R9 — Environment-gated Gemini** | Mock/fixture in `local` + `staging-e2e`; real Gemini only in `staging` + `production`. Enforced at startup, not runtime. |
| **R10 — Bearer-only auth** | No cookies, no CSRF surface. Firebase token is the only credential the API accepts. |

---

## 9. Dependencies

### Backend (`backend/pyproject.toml`)

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `fastapi` | ≥0.115 | HTTP framework |
| `uvicorn[standard]` | ≥0.34 | ASGI server |
| `sqlalchemy[asyncio]` | ≥2.0 | ORM (async) |
| `asyncpg` | ≥0.30 | Async Postgres driver |
| `alembic` | ≥1.14 | DB migrations |
| `firebase-admin` | ≥6.6 | Firebase ID-token verification |
| `pydantic` | ≥2.10 | Data validation + serialization |
| `pydantic-settings` | ≥2.7 | Settings from env vars |
| `pydantic-ai` | ≥1.99 | Structured Gemini output |
| `google-generativeai` | ≥0.8 | Gemini API |
| `sse-starlette` | ≥2.2 | Server-Sent Events |
| `structlog` | ≥24.0 | Structured logging |
| `Pillow` | ≥11.0 | Image resize-on-write |
| `pymupdf` | ≥1.24 | PDF statement parsing |
| `pypdf` | ≥6.10, <6.11 | PDF fallback parser |
| `httpx` | ≥0.28 | Async HTTP (FX API, tests) |
| `python-dotenv` | ≥1.0 | `.env.*` file loading |
| `defusedxml` | ≥0.7 | Safe XML parsing |

**Dev:** `pytest`, `pytest-asyncio`, `ruff`, `mypy`, `aiosqlite`, `pip-audit`

### Web (`web/package.json`)

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `react` | ^19.2 | UI framework |
| `@tanstack/react-router` | ^1.169 | File-based routing |
| `@tanstack/react-query` | ^5.100 | Server state + cache |
| `zustand` | ^5.0 | Client state |
| `firebase` | ^12.13 | Auth SDK |
| `openapi-fetch` | ^0.17 | Typed API client |
| `recharts` | ^2.15 | Analytics charts |
| `tailwindcss` | ^4.3 | CSS utility framework |
| `vite` | ^8.0 | Build tool |
| `vitest` | ^4.1 | Unit tests |
| `openapi-typescript` | ^7.13 | Type generation from OpenAPI spec |

### Mobile (`mobile/package.json`)

Expo 55 + React Native 0.83 + `react-native-firebase` + `expo-secure-store` +
`expo-image-picker` + `expo-document-picker` + TanStack Query + Zustand +
`openapi-fetch`.

## 10. Code Structure

```
gastify/
├── backend/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── api/              # 17 route handlers (scans, transactions, insights, groups, …)
│   │   ├── agents/           # PydanticAI agents (extraction, categorization, statement)
│   │   ├── auth/             # Firebase middleware + dependency injection
│   │   ├── models/           # SQLAlchemy ORM (11 model files)
│   │   ├── schemas/          # Pydantic request/response schemas
│   │   ├── services/         # Business logic (scan, statement, insights, FX, consent, …)
│   │   │   └── insights/     # Analytics sub-package (tree, monthly, gravity, trend)
│   │   ├── prompts/          # Versioned AI prompt registry (receipt, statement, categorization)
│   │   ├── prompt_lab/       # Prompt evaluation CLI + scoring
│   │   ├── reference/        # V4 taxonomy definitions (86 categories, store categories)
│   │   ├── fixtures/         # Deterministic E2E fixtures (scan, statement)
│   │   ├── config.py         # All GASTIFY_* settings
│   │   ├── db.py             # Async engine + session factory + RLS boot guard
│   │   ├── main.py           # FastAPI app factory + router registration
│   │   └── middleware.py     # RequestId + AccessLog middleware
│   ├── alembic/
│   │   └── versions/         # 34 numbered migrations (001–034)
│   └── tests/                # pytest (unit + integration; SQLite for local runs)
│
├── web/
│   └── src/
│       ├── routes/           # TanStack Router file-based routes (16 route files)
│       ├── components/       # Shared UI components (charts, layout, overlays)
│       ├── hooks/            # React hooks (useAuth, useInsights, useReportDetail, …)
│       ├── stores/           # Zustand stores (uiStore — activeScope)
│       ├── lib/              # API client, Firebase config, generated OpenAPI types
│       └── styles/           # Global CSS + design tokens
│
├── mobile/
│   └── src/
│       ├── screens/          # Native screen components
│       ├── navigation/       # React Navigation stack
│       ├── components/       # Native UI components (charts, cards, overlays)
│       ├── hooks/            # Mobile-specific hooks
│       ├── stores/           # Zustand stores
│       └── lib/              # API client, secure storage, generated types
│
├── docs/
│   ├── architecture.md       # Top-level architecture map (gravity wells G1–G7)
│   ├── wells/                # Per-well deep dives (1-api-core … 7-mobile-app)
│   └── runbooks/             # LOCAL, STAGING-TESTING, RAILWAY-STAGING-SETUP, …
│
├── copilot-docs/             # This folder — project-documenter output
│   ├── project-summary.md    # This document
│   └── diagrams/             # draw.io + PNG architecture diagrams
│
├── tests/
│   ├── web-e2e/              # Playwright E2E specs
│   └── mobile/               # Maestro YAML flows + test harness
│
├── scripts/dev/              # start-local.sh, smoke-local.sh, bootstrap-local-db.py
├── prompt-testing/           # Prompt lab: baselines, test cases, evaluation
├── .kdbp/                    # KDBP project memory (plan, decisions, structure, ledger)
├── CONTRIBUTING.md           # Developer onboarding guide (start here)
└── README.md                 # Project overview + env var reference
```
